description_long: This object is a compact USB flash drive, featuring a rectangular body with rounded edges and a two-tone color scheme of gray and black. The main body is constructed from a smooth plastic material, with a metallic or plastic swivel cover that partially encases the drive and has a circular cutout near one end. The USB connector is exposed at one end, designed for easy insertion into USB ports on computers or other electronic devices. The swivel cover likely rotates to protect the connector when not in use, providing both functionality and durability. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible branding or additional buttons, emphasizing portability and ease of use. Its size and form factor make it suitable for carrying in a pocket or attaching to a keychain.
description: A compact, two-tone USB flash drive with a swivel cover and exposed USB connector, designed for portable data storage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the flash drive, with the USB connector on the left and the swivel cover's circular cutout visible.
description_view_1: End view from the back, highlighting the rounded edge and the flat surface of the swivel cover.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the USB connector on the right and the smooth, uninterrupted surface of the body.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the USB connector and the circular cutout in the swivel cover, emphasizing the point of interaction.
